# Gold Rush Town issue templates

Use these templates to keep the community/public split clear.

- `ui_design.yml` — for visual/design work that belongs in this public community repo.
- `sasame_backend_feature.yml` — for requests that need SaSame private-side data, official feeds, trust/economy rules, or backend implementation.

Blank issues are disabled because this repo is intentionally narrow: the community builds the visual layer, while SaSame owns official data and system behavior.
